Petition For Emergency Preliminary Distribution; For Allowance On Account Of Compensation To Attorneys; For Order To Shorten Notice
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vincent Yu for Vera Nelson and Mozel Kittling (Co-Administrators).

Mr. Yu stated that the settlement amount to Maurice McClain is $27,250.00, that he is asking for 49% of the Estate to be distributed, that he spoke with the Probate Examiner and that he is willing to defer payment of attorney fees until final distribution. The Court granted the Petition for Emergency Preliminary Distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Continued To Apr-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James O'Neil for and with Vera Nelson and Mozel Kittling (Administrators).
Greer Smith for and with Maurice McClain (Objector).

Counsel indicated that they have not talked to each other and stated their Client's positions with respect to the issue of whether McClain is/is not equitably or statutorily adopted. The parties spoke outside of the courtroom and upon returning reported that they agreed to mediation and that they wanted to conduct some discovery. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation (copy provided to Counsel). Mediation must be completed no later than April 3, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 6, 2017. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on April 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. If the parties are unable to resolve the matter, the Court expects that the parties have met and conferred to determine what needs to be done to get it resolved.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Barrientos. Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (358 San Miguel St, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Jun-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James O'Neil for petitioner Vera Nelson.

Mr. O'Neil stated that there was no reason not to proceed with the sale of the real property located at 358 San Miguel Street, San Francisco, California. The opening bid was $805,000.00. There were no overbidders. The sale was confirmed at $805,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale dated April 22, 2016. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Mr. O'Neil stated that the sale was to close in 30 days after the order for sale, and confirmed that the sales funds would be placed in a blocked account. The Court set a status hearing re receipt for deposit of sales proceeds into a blocked account for August 22, 2016 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: John Boncato. (Not reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (358 San Miguel St, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Continued To Jun-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James O'Neil for (administrators) Vera Nelson & Mozel Kittling.

The Court stated that it has a notice and report of sale, that it does not have a proof of service, proof of publication, proof of posting and that it needs a reappraisal for sale. Mr. O'Neil stated that he had received a call from the clerk to alert him to the posting issue and that he did not get the inventory & appraisal back until yesterday. The report of sale and petition to confirm sale of real property was continued to June 21, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Rueppel for Vera Nelson and Mozel Kittling (Petitioners).

The Court noted that the matter was pre-granted on December 16, 2013 but a Ms. Kittling appeared to object and that she was instructed to file written objections. Mr. Rueppel stated that he did not receive any written objections. With no objections filed or anyone in court to objection, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Continued To Jan-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diana Kittling in Propria Persona.

This was a pregranted matter. Ms. Kittling stated that she is objecting. Ms. Kittling was informed that she needs to file written objection or a competing petition for appointment. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to January 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien. (Not Reported)
